This page will list R packages, scripts, datasets, reproducible workflows, and
other software-related academic outputs.

## Packages

## Reproducible Workflows

or computational resource.

## Example R Chunk

You can include R code in Quarto pages. The code below is only an example and
can be deleted.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
summary(cars)
```
